name_en: St. Michael and St. Gudula Cathedral

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures d'ouverture de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay zuhr doo-vair-TOOR duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is open daily for visitors but closes during services. Entry is free.

responses.english: 7am to 6pm on weekdays. Closed during services.
responses.phonetic: duh set uhr ah dee-zweet uhr ahn suh-MEN. fair-MAY pahn-DAHN lay zoh-FEES
responses.local: De sept heures à dix-huit heures en semaine. Fermé pendant les offices.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the stained glass windows
phrases.cultural_note: The modern stained glass windows (1993) were created by Francis Duyff. They replaced wartime losses with abstract contemporary designs.

responses.english: In the choir and transepts. Look up high.
responses.phonetic: dahn luh KUHR ay lay trahn-SEP. ruh-gar-DAY ahn oh-TUHR
responses.local: Dans le choeur et les transepts. Regardez en hauteur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entry fee
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the cathedral is free. The treasury requires a small separate fee.

responses.english: Entry is free. The treasury visit costs three euros.
responses.phonetic: lahn-TRAY eh grah-TWEET. lah vee-ZEET doo tray-ZOR koot trwah uh-ROH
responses.local: L'entrée est gratuite. La visite du trésor coûte trois euros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Les photos sont-elles autorisées à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay foh-TOH son-tel oh-toh-ree-ZAY ah lan-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is generally allowed inside the cathedral, but flash photography is not permitted.
